releases.notes: Header Market range is all-time for the selected series; empty stats show 0 / +$0.00 instead of dashes; schedule docs updated.
Gap vs PTB First and Both (same rules for FAK and GTD); setup delete and locked schedule-card removal confirmations; docs updates.
Schedule setups list scrolls when cards overflow, using the same thin scrollbar as the log panel.
Schedule Replay mode: separate setups and placements from Live, Live/Replay switcher, Replay run button (service URL stub), and docs for Replay.
Shorter product docs; Docs/Versions no longer flash Market on refresh; Poly Real title and App label stay stable; docs section hover no longer shifts layout.
Settings button and top bar height matched across Market/Schedule/Settings and Docs/Versions.
GTD resting buys cancel ~3s before phase end and the next phase places without waiting on cancel; docs section layout/hover polish; Settings stays available on Docs/Versions when signed in.
Settings Documentation card moved to the top as a single-row label + Open control.

Docs & Versions as /docs and /version routes; setups/phases and information-flow docs with UI demos and flow diagrams; docs search; Settings link to documentation; signed-in Back control; docs permission Cursor rules.
Homepage Main / Docs / Versions tabs; right-column auth layout; Markdown product docs under public/docs; versions changelog; Cursor rules for dev→main workflow.
Initial Poly Real app: auth, Market, Schedule / Heatmap, Settings, and live/demo trading.
